title: On A Celebrated Ruling Elder.
content:
Here souter Hood in death does sleep;
            To h--ll, if he's gane thither,
        Satan, gie him thy gear to keep,
            He'll haud it weel thegither.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "On A Celebrated Ruling Elder.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
